testcase.name: test_public_nav_returns_mega

failure.message: AssertionError: No mega item found in header. Got: [{'label': 'Accueil', 'href': '/', 'external': False}, {'label': 'TEST Mega', 'href': '#', 'external': False}] assert 0 >= 1 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration23_legal_mega_mobile.py:84: in test_public_nav_returns_mega assert len(mega_items) >= 1, f"No mega item found in header. Got: {header}" E AssertionError: No mega item found in header. Got: [{'label': 'Accueil', 'href': '/', 'external': False}, {'label': 'TEST Mega', 'href': '#', 'external': False}] E assert 0 >= 1 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_public_design_reflects_mega

failure.message: AssertionError: design.navigation.header should expose mega item. Got header: [{'label': 'Accueil', 'href': '/', 'external': False}, {'label': 'TEST Mega', 'href': '#', 'external': False}] assert 0 >= 1 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration23_legal_mega_mobile.py:96: in test_public_design_reflects_mega assert len(mega_items) >= 1, f"design.navigation.header should expose mega item. Got header: {header}" E AssertionError: design.navigation.header should expose mega item. Got header: [{'label': 'Accueil', 'href': '/', 'external': False}, {'label': 'TEST Mega', 'href': '#', 'external': False}] E assert 0 >= 1 E + where 0 = len([])
